overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: MongoDB integration uses the Filebeat MongoDB module to automatically collect and parse MongoDB database logs. It helps you monitor database operations, analyze slow queries, track replication status, and troubleshoot connection issues.

items.title: Query Analysis
items.description: Parse query statements, execution plans, scan document counts

items.title: Slow Query Detection
items.description: Identify queries exceeding slowMs threshold for optimization

items.title: Replication Monitoring
items.description: Track replica set member status, sync lag, elections

items.title: Connection Management
items.description: Monitor client connections, connection pool usage, timeouts

fieldTables.title: Parsed Fields
fieldTables.description: MongoDB logs will be parsed into the following structured fields:

data.description: Log severity (D, I, W, E, F)
